coverage.note: full 500 questions; evidence-session recall 0.9590 is a separate deterministic signal

claimBoundary.reason: Closest to a public claim, but blocked: answer accuracy partially relies on a same-model semantic judge (gpt-5.5 answer + gpt-5.5 judge) for the semantic_judge subset (the other methods abstention/contains/exact/expected_alternative/numeric_count are deterministic); license, exact commit, and v0.3 package version are unverified. P67-B replay must run on the v0.3 surface with an independent judge for the semantic_judge subset (or report a deterministic-only sub-score).
